name: Watermelon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon into a large bowl.
2. Cream butter and sugar in a separate bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs to the butter mixture and whisk well.
4. Gradually add milk, watermelon juice, pulp, and raisins to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Carefully pour the batter into greased muffin cups, filling them about 2/3 full.
6. Bake for 25 minutes in a preheated oven.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Note: For a more vibrant watermelon color, add a few drops of red food coloring to the batter before filling the muffin cups.
